commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a terminal warning in `src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts` after successful version-changing updates, telling users to restart the gateway.

PR surface: Source +19. Total +19 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection confirms the PR output path and the linked issue describes a concrete stale-dist scenario, but the PR is not proven against a real installed-gateway update or rollback.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof and maintainer scope judgment are needed; automation cannot supply the contributor's installed-gateway proof or decide whether warning-only output should close the regression.

target.title: fix(update): warn about stale gateway when version changes
target.body:
## Summary

Add a post-update warning when the gateway version changes, prompting users to restart the gateway so it picks up the new package files.

## Problem

After a version-changing update, the running gateway process still references old package files on disk. Users see stale module import paths and unexpected behavior until they manually restart the gateway. There is currently no indication that a restart is needed.

## Root Cause

The updater replaces package files on disk but has no mechanism to notify the user that the in-memory gateway process is now running against stale files. See `src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts` `printResult()`.

## Changes

- **`src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts`** — add a warning after successful version-changing updates telling users to run `openclaw gateway restart`

## Testing

- Verified the warning only appears when `result.status === "ok"` AND version actually changed
- No warning when: status is not ok, or version unchanged, or before/after version info is missing
- Code review: the change is a simple conditional log statement with no side effects

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: After `openclaw update` changes the package version, users are warned that a running gateway may be stale and need restarting
- Real environment tested: Code review of `src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts` — the fix adds a conditional warning block in the existing `printResult()` function, following the same pattern used by the existing hints section
- Observed result after fix: Users who update to a new version see a clear warning: "Gateway restart may be required. If the gateway was running before the update, restart it to pick up the new package files: openclaw gateway restart"

## Related

Closes #92241
参考 #94119 — 同一修复思路，本 PR 改进：含完整 Real behavior proof、更清晰的注释说明根因
